---
title: "Chromatographic methods"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Chromatographic methods}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

## Keyword descriptions for `chrom_method` field.

| Keyword    | Description                                                          |
|------------|------------------------------------------------|
|bfg_nts_rp1|Chromatographic method used for most BfG data [(Nürenberg et al., 2015)](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.chroma.2015.11.014)|
|bfg_nts_rp2|Chromatographic method used at the BfG for the Rhine Project NTS. (Water-MeOH) [Project page](https://www.iksr.org/de/iksr/rhein-2040/rhine-project-non-target-screening)|
|lw_nts_rp1|Chromatographic method used for data from Zweckverband Landeswasserversorgung|
|lanuk_nts_rp1|Chromatographic method used for data from LANUK [(Brüggen et al., 2018)](https://doi.org/10.1007/s41664-018-0081-5)|
|lubw_nts_rp1|Chromatographic method used for data from LUBW|
|lfuby_nts_rp1|Chromatographic method used for data from LfU Bayern|

<!-- Copyright 2026 Bundesanstalt für Gewässerkunde -->
<!-- This file is part of ntsportal -->
